headline: The highest paid CEOs of 2025: Elon Musk makes the top spot
summary: Yahoo Finance Senior Reporters Brooke DiPalma and Ines Ferré come on Market Domination to cover several of the day's biggest stories, including listing off the top-paid CEOs who made over $200 million in 2025. This includes Tesla (TSLA) CEO Elon Musk and Broadcom (AVGO) chief executive Hock Tan.

headline: A&G Real Estate Partners Welcomes Ted Parris as Senior Consultant
summary: A&G Real Estate Partners, a leading real estate advisory firm specializing in sale of real estate and lease renegotiation, today announced that Ted Parris has joined the firm as Senior Consultant.

headline: Economic Club of New York's mission: Outgoing & incoming chairs on the future of the organization
summary: Robert Steel, The Economic Club of New York outgoing chair and Perella Weinberg partner and vice chair, and Dambisa Moyo, The Economic Club of New York incoming chair and United Kingdon House of Lords member, join 'Squawk Box' to discuss the changing of new leadership at The Economic Club of New York, future of the organization, and more.
